creator: udsd007@gmail.com
text:
$ uname -a
FreeBSD mikea.ath.cx 11.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE #0: Mon May 28 18:42:12 CDT 2018     root@mikea.ath.cx:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/AMD64-IPFW1+PF+DTRACE  amd64
$ freebsd-version
11.1-RELEASE

Attempts to make /usr/ports/multimedia/plexhometheater (make fetch, make, make install) all fail with 

/usr/ports/multimedia/plexhometheater # make
make: "/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1465: Cannot open /usr/ports/Mk/Uses/execinfo.mk
make: Fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
make: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/plexhometheater

this is with a fresh (portsnap fetch extract) ports tree.

Repeatable on two different FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE servers.
